arts.ttl: Norwich chief's candid away form admission
arts.sum: Norwich City head coach Johannes Hoff Thorup has admitted that his side are struggling to take their home form on the road, but says it's an ongoing process.

arts.ttl: Club considering whether to sign Crystal Palace or Norwich City player
arts.sum: Tyrick Mitchell has been a regular for Crystal Palace this season and Jose Cordoba has been an important part of Norwich City’s backline in the Championship in the current campaign. The Englishman has played 17 times in all competitions for the Eagles, operating at left wing-back under Oliver Glasner. arts.ttl: ‘Will punish them’ – QPR vs Norwich City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their QPR vs Norwich City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Will punish them’ – QPR vs Norwich City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Norwich U21s chief hails 'really good night' for his team
arts.sum: Norwich City under-21s coach Olly Lee was delighted with his side's performance as they beat European giants PSV Eindhoven at Carrow Road.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City U21s v PSV Eindhoven
arts.sum: Follow live updates as Norwich City's under-21s face PSV Eindhoven at Carrow Road in the Premier League International Cup.
